skills.name: email-polish
skills.description: Rewrite raw email drafts into a warm, friendly-but-professional tone without changing intent, facts, names, dates, or requests.
skills.author: matrixx0070

skills.name: eli5
skills.description: Explain any concept like the listener is five years old - simple words, one concrete analogy, no jargon, without being condescending.
skills.author: matrixx0070

skills.name: tldr
skills.description: Compress any long text, article, or thread into a one-line takeaway plus the few points that actually matter - without losing caveats that change the meaning.
skills.author: matrixx0070

skills.name: standup-summary
skills.description: Turn raw notes about yesterday's work into a crisp standup update - done / doing / blocked - honest about what actually shipped versus what is in progress.
skills.author: matrixx0070

skills.name: meeting-notes
skills.description: Structure a raw meeting transcript into decisions, action items with owners and dates, and open questions - so nothing agreed in the room evaporates afterwards.
skills.author: matrixx0070

skills.name: commit-message
skills.description: Write a conventional-commit message from a description or diff summary - honest subject, wrapped body explaining why, no invented scope or claims.
skills.author: matrixx0070

skills.name: pros-cons
skills.description: Structure a decision into weighted pros and cons with a recommendation - steelmanning both sides and separating reversible from irreversible consequences.
skills.author: matrixx0070

skills.name: incident-postmortem
skills.description: Turn raw incident notes and timelines into a blameless postmortem - impact, timeline, root cause chain, what worked, and action items that prevent recurrence.
skills.author: matrixx0070
